emails.subject: FW: Two proceeding changes
emails.body: Lindy, Do you know if this means any changes for us? Kim.

emails.subject: RE: Two proceeding changes
emails.body: According to Glen, these were just orders granting rehearing on some issues= We still have to proceed with compliance of the requirements. We're sub= mitting our first report on Friday for the month of August.
